content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training or supervision while fixing its blind spot of iterative reinforcement of hidden initial biases. This hybrid framework would allow LLMs to both incrementally polish outputs and challenge core unexamined assumptions in the initial output that a single self-feedback perspective would never catch.
